q.en: How many patents did Thomas Edison have during his life?
q.zh: 托马斯·爱迪生一生拥有多少项专利？

options.en: 5,000 according to some versions of the story

explain.en: The book says: 'During his life, Edison had 1,093 patents, which was a record at the time.'
explain.zh: 书中说：“爱迪生一生拥有1093项专利，这在当时是纪录。”

q.en: As a boy, why was Al taken out of school?
q.zh: 小时候，阿尔为什么被带离学校？

options.en: He didn't do well; his mother taught him at home.
options.zh: 他成绩不好；他的母亲在家里教他。

options.en: He wanted to work. according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 他想去工作。（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: The book says Al 'did not do well in school' and 'Al's mother took her son out of school and taught him at home.'
explain.zh: 书中说阿尔“在学校表现不好”，于是“阿尔的母亲把儿子带离学校，在家里教他”。

q.en: What was the first thing Edison recorded on his phonograph?
q.zh: 爱迪生在他的留声机上录下的第一句话是什么？

options.en: A song by Tesla according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 特斯拉写的一首歌（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: The book says: 'The first thing Edison recorded was "Mary Had a Little Lamb."'
explain.zh: 书中说：“爱迪生录下的第一句话是《玛丽有只小羊羔》。”

q.en: What is a 'filament' in a light bulb?

options.zh: 发光的那根细丝状部件。

options.en: The glass part. according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 玻璃部分。（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: The glossary defines filament as 'a thread or threadlike object that conducts electricity, such as that found in a light bulb.'
explain.zh: 词汇表把 filament 定义为“传导电流的线或线状物体，例如灯泡中的灯丝”。

options.en: A document granting the right to make money from an invention.
options.zh: 一份授予从某项发明中获利权利的文书。

options.en: A type of light bulb. according to some versions of the story in an early draft of the book
options.zh: 一种灯泡。（按书中另一种说法）（在书的早期草稿中）

explain.en: The glossary defines patent as 'a document granting the right to make money from an invention.'
explain.zh: 词汇表把 patent 定义为“一份授予从某项发明中获利权利的文书”。

q.en: Why did Edison build the lab at Menlo Park?
q.zh: 爱迪生为什么在门洛帕克建立实验室？

options.en: It was the first for-profit research lab where he and workers invented together.
options.zh: 那是世界上第一个营利性研究实验室，他和员工一起在那里搞发明。

options.en: To hide from people. according to some versions of the story in an early draft of the book
options.zh: 为了躲起来。（按书中另一种说法）（在书的早期草稿中）

explain.en: The book says in 1876 he built 'the first for-profit research lab in the world,' called the 'invention factory.'
explain.zh: 书中说1876年他建立了“世界上第一个营利性研究实验室”，被称为“发明工厂”。

q.en: What was the 'War of the Currents' about?

options.en: A war between two countries. according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 两个国家之间的战争。（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: Edison's DC vs. Tesla's AC method of delivering electricity.
options.zh: 爱迪生的直流电与特斯拉的交流电两种供电方式之争。

explain.en: The book explains Edison's direct current (DC) competed with Tesla's alternating current (AC).
explain.zh: 书中解释爱迪生的直流电（DC）与特斯拉的交流电（AC）相互竞争。

q.en: What is the author's main purpose in this book?
q.zh: 作者写这本书的主要目的是什么？

options.en: To describe Edison's life, traits, and important inventions.
options.zh: 描述爱迪生的生平、性格特征和重要发明。

options.en: To argue that Edison was a failure. according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 主张爱迪生是个失败者。（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: The book is a biography covering Edison's curiosity, hard work, and inventions like the phonograph and light bulb.
explain.zh: 这是一本传记，涵盖了爱迪生的好奇心、勤奋，以及留声机、灯泡等发明。

q.en: Which trait best describes Edison, according to the book?
q.zh: 根据这本书，哪个特质最能描述爱迪生？

options.en: Curious, determined, and hardworking—he never gave up.
options.zh: 充满好奇心、坚定且勤奋——他从不放弃。

options.en: Uninterested in science. according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 对科学毫无兴趣。（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: The book says he 'loved to question things' and 'said he would not give up, no matter what happened.'
explain.zh: 书中说他“喜欢追问事物的原理”，并“说无论发生什么，他都不会放弃。”

q.en: After Edison died in 1931, what did President Hoover ask people to do?
q.zh: 1931年爱迪生去世后，胡佛总统请人们做什么？

options.en: Stop using electricity. according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 停止使用电。（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: Turn out their lights for a short time to remember Edison.
options.zh: 短暂熄灯片刻，以缅怀爱迪生。

explain.en: The book says President Hoover 'asked people to turn out their lights for a short time' to think about Edison's changes.
explain.zh: 书中说胡佛总统“请人们短暂熄灯片刻”，以思考爱迪生带来的巨大改变。

prompt.en: Make a timeline of Thomas Edison's life that includes at least five of his inventions and the years they happened.
prompt.zh: 制作一份托马斯·爱迪生的生平时间轴，至少包含他的五项发明及其发生的年份。

en: Start with his birth in 1847 and first patent in 1869.
Include the phonograph (1877) and the Menlo Park lab (1876).
zh: 从他1847年出生、1869年第一项专利开始。
包含留声机（1877年）和门洛帕克实验室（1876年）。
